description: A faithful tiny antique brass robot Codex pet based on the provided reference, with a rounded oversized head, warm glowing oval eyes, single ball-tip antenna, tiny ball-jointed limbs, and a gentle lonely storybook mood.

idle.notes: Calm standing idle with tiny breathing, soft eye-light pulse, and slight head tip.

walk.notes: Directional gentle walk rows used for movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Quiet wonder with a small lean, tiny hand lift, and slightly brighter eyes.

happy.notes: Restrained happy gesture with a small hand lift and gentle body bounce.

sleep.notes: Main dozing loop with lowered head, dimmed eyes, and peaceful breathing.

hold_star.notes: Tender held-star cuddle loop using the spare atlas row.

probe.notes: Quiet non-directional task loop with tiny in-place processing motion.

deep_rest.notes: Spare deeper-rest loop with tucked posture and relaxed limbs.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true left-facing and right-facing walk rows.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the true left-facing strip
right drag uses the true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, eyes, torso, hands, legs, and feet stay directionally unified in both walk rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
